title: bus.bead.created v1
description: DEPRECATED (2026-05-16, nervous-bus-immg): aspirational schema not emitted by any producer. The canonical bead lifecycle stream is bus.bead.lifecycle.v1; bead creation is currently observed via bd hooks and Forge, not via this bus channel.

bead_id.description: Cross-project bead id (e.g. tengine-9k2x, loom-78wk, nb-plugin-route)

project.description: Which project's .beads/ this bead lives in

description_excerpt.description: First 1000 chars of the bead description (full text via bd show)

depends_on.description: Other bead_ids this one blocks on

has_acceptance_criteria.description: True if the bead has machine-readable acceptance — required for hearth-loom to claim
